name: stillos
description: Calibrated probability signals for Kalshi CPI and GDP prediction markets. Political Brier 0.0004 on 1,249 forward-committed predictions. Tamper-evident notarization. All outputs signed Ed25519. x402 USDC micropayments on Base.

tools.name: get_cpi_signal
tools.description: Calibrated P(YES) for Kalshi CPI markets. Cleveland Fed Nowcast. Signed receipt.

tools.name: get_gdp_signal
tools.description: Calibrated P(YES) for Kalshi GDP markets. Atlanta Fed GDPNow. Signed receipt.

tools.name: get_active_signals
tools.description: All signals with edge >= 10 cents, ranked. No payment required.

tools.name: commit_claim
tools.description: Notarize any claim. Ed25519-signed hash-chained receipt. Permanently verifiable.

tools.name: verify_receipt
tools.description: Verify any StillOS receipt by hash. Always free.

tools.name: grade_strategy
tools.description: Submit trade history → REAL_EDGE|REGIME_LUCK|NEGATIVE_EV verdict with signed receipt.

tools.name: get_trust_record
tools.description: Read honest Brier scores before trusting signals.
